title: Add update button to flight log form

requirements.text: Add an 'Update' button to the flight log form that appears when editing an existing flight log entry, positioned at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/form[1]/div[2]/button[2], which saves changes to the backend and closes the edit dialog
acceptanceCriteria: Update button is visible in the form when editing a flight log entry
Button is positioned at the specified XPath location alongside the existing submit button
Clicking the update button calls the updateFlightLog mutation with the modified data
Button shows loading state during the update operation
Form closes and flight logs table refreshes after successful update

requirements.text: Ensure the date input field at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/form[1]/div[1]/div[1]/input[1] maintains its current functionality during edit mode, allowing users to modify the date value using the calendar picker
acceptanceCriteria: Date input field is editable when the form is in edit mode
Calendar picker opens when clicking the date field
Selected date from calendar updates the input value
Date field validation continues to work correctly

requirements.text: Verify that the close button at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/button[1] properly cancels the edit operation and closes the form dialog without saving changes
acceptanceCriteria: Close button is visible and clickable in the dialog
Clicking close button cancels the edit operation
Form dialog closes without persisting any changes
No backend mutation is triggered when closing without update

constraints: Do not modify the backend actor structure or API
Preserve the current useFlightLogs hook implementation that already supports update operations
nonGoals: Adding new fields to the flight log form
Changing the overall layout of the form dialog
Modifying backend data models or update logic
